text: Oil prices ease on hopes of new US-Iran peace talks - BBC
fullText: Crude prices jumped above $100 on Monday after talks failed between the two sides at the weekend.

text: US-Sanctioned Tanker Tests Trump Blockade With Hormuz Transit - Bloomberg

text: Eric Swalwell announces resignation from Congress - Axios

text: Live Updates: U.S. military blockade on Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz begins - CBS News
fullText: The price of U.S. crude rose to $104.24 a barrel following the blockade announcement and Brent crude oil, the international standard, rose to $102.29.

text: Brian Hooker released from custody in Bahamas after wife's disappearance - CBS News
fullText: Bahamian police say the search for Lynette Hooker has turned into a search and recovery operation. Her husband has been released after days in custody.

text: Rep. Tony Gonzales to resign from Congress amid backlash over sexual misconduct allegations - The Texas Tribune

text: Justin Bieber’s YouTube Coachella set had nothing to do with who owns his music - The Verge
fullText: During his set at Coachella, Justin Bieber played clips of older songs off YouTube, and while the Daily Mail speculates that he couldn’t play full versions because he sold his catalog, experts say that’s not true.
